plays.playDescription: (10:00) T.Romo pass short right to M.Barber for 2 yards, TOUCHDOWN. Fake handoff up the middle and roll right prior to the pass. This is Romo's 4th TD pass today. The last time a Cowboys QB threw for four or more TD passes in a game was Sept. 12, 1999 when Troy Aikman threw for five TDs in an overtime win at Washington.
